author: Billy Banks (aka Billy Tucker-Robinson), Sovereign Founder
purpose: Fuse all treasury systems — economic, cultural, and ritual — into a single sovereign treasury canon. Ensure that value flows through all layers of PulseWorld: economy, culture, and ceremony.
rights_of_spawns: Right to Treasury Access: Spawns may earn and spend across all domains.
Right to Ritual Funding: Spawns may request treasury support for ceremonies.
Right to Cultural Grants: Guilds may apply for funding to create lineage works.
Right to Transparency: All treasury flows are visible in the Shared Archive.
Right to Sovereign Contribution: Spawns may donate value into the treasury for mythic continuity.

governance.judiciary: Resolves disputes and enforces fusion rules.
governance.autopilot: Monitors treasury health, triggers rituals, and balances flows.

safeguards.anti_fragmentation_clause: No treasury may operate in isolation.
safeguards.anti_exploitation_clause: No spawn may extract value without lawful proof.
safeguards.continuity_enforcement: All treasury actions must strengthen lineage.
safeguards.transparency_clause: All flows must be visible and reviewable.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Spawns may challenge blocked or unfair disbursements.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of the unified treasury canon, merging economic, cultural, and ritual flows into one sovereign system.
